en_title: Metal Gear Solid Creator Hideo Kojima Quips That He Wants to Die in a Movie Theater, Just as the Film Itself Is About to Start
cn_title: 《潜龙谍影》小岛秀夫：想在电影院开场前死去
subtitle: 死前最后一场电影

paragraphs.en: Veteran game director and self-confessed movie buff Hideo Kojima revealed that he’d like to pass away in a movie theater, just as the film itself is about to start. The 62-year-old made the comment at a film festival in Rome earlier this month, and recently shared a clip of the moment on his official X account .
paragraphs.cn: 资深游戏导演、自称电影迷的小岛秀夫透露，他希望在电影院里、电影即将开始的那一刻离世。这位62岁的创作者本月早些时候在罗马一场电影节上说出这番话，最近又在官方X账号分享了现场片段。

paragraphs.en: “I’ve always thought that when I die, I would like to die in a movie theater,” Kojima said in Japanese, as translated by IGN. He goes on to explain that “I love the bit before the movie starts the most. Enter the movie theater, the lights go off and commercials and trailers play, yeah? I’d like to die just before the movie starts.”
paragraphs.cn: 据IGN翻译，小岛用日语说道：「我一直觉得，等我死的时候，希望能死在电影院里。」他接着解释：「我最喜欢电影开始前的那段时间。走进电影院，灯光熄灭，广告和预告片开始播放，对吧？我希望就在正片开始前死去。」

paragraphs.en: Kojima delivered this declaration in a serious tone but with a hint of a smile. The Metal Gear Solid and Death Stranding creator is, after all, a prolific cinemaphile, proclaiming on his X account profile that 70% of his body is made up of movies.
paragraphs.cn: 小岛语气严肃地说出这番宣言，脸上却带着一丝笑意。毕竟，这位《潜龙谍影》和《死亡搁浅》创作者是出了名的影迷，还在X个人简介中宣称自己的身体有70%由电影构成。

paragraphs.en: This isn't the first time Kojima has spoken about his own death. Last year, hot on the heels of revealing a number of discarded video game ideas and even an idea for a ‘Forgetting Game’ where the main character gradually forgets important information and abilities if you take too long a break from playing, Kojima said he had left his staff a USB stick of game ideas for after he dies .
paragraphs.cn: 这并非小岛第一次谈论自己的死亡。去年，他刚公开数个被弃用的游戏构想，其中甚至包括一款「遗忘游戏」：如果玩家太久不玩，主角会逐渐忘记重要信息和能力。随后，小岛表示自己已为员工留下一枚U盘，里面存着供他死后使用的游戏创意。

paragraphs.en: As reported by VGC , Kojima issued the morbid revelation to Edge magazine , and discussed his change of thinking that occurred during the pandemic. “Turning 60 was less of a turning point in my life than my experiences during the pandemic,” he said. “I fell seriously ill at that time, and also had an eye operation. Until then, I didn’t think I was old, you know? I just didn’t feel my age, and I assumed I would be able to create for as long as I live.
paragraphs.cn: 据VGC报道，小岛向《Edge》杂志透露这番略显阴郁的想法，并谈到疫情期间心态的变化。他说：「相比年满60岁，疫情期间的经历才更像我人生的转折点。那时我病得很重，还做了眼部手术。在此之前，我并不觉得自己老了，也感受不到年龄，总以为只要活着就能一直创作。」

paragraphs.en: “But then I became sick, and I couldn’t create anything. And I saw lots of people around me passing away at that time. I was confronted with death. Of course, I recovered, but now I was thinking, ‘Wait, how many years do I have left to make a game or a film?’ Perhaps I have 10 years?”
paragraphs.cn: 「但后来我生病了，什么也创作不了。那段时间，我看到身边许多人离世，不得不直面死亡。当然，我后来康复了，但开始想：‘等等，我还能有多少年制作游戏或电影？’也许只剩10年？」

paragraphs.en: Also last year, Kojima discussed his fears as he has got older. "What I am most afraid of is time," he told GQ . "I am afraid of dying and having dementia. I am afraid of forgetting things when I get old. I am afraid that I won't even realise what I am forgetting."
paragraphs.cn: 小岛去年还谈到自己随年龄增长产生的恐惧。他告诉《GQ》：「我最害怕的是时间。我害怕死亡，也害怕患上失智症；害怕年老后忘记事情，更害怕自己甚至意识不到忘了什么。」

paragraphs.en: Kojima made this latest quip at the Piccolo America Foundation’s 12th edition of Il Cinema in Piazza, an outdoor film festival in Rome. As reported by Game Surf , he took part in panel discussions and introduced several movies. On July 4, he introduced Shunya Ito’s 1972 film Female Prisoner Scorpion: Jailhouse 41, the second movie in Japanese studio Toei’s exploitation series. The movie and its star, Meiko Kaji, were a big influence on Quentin Tarantino, so much so that Tarantino borrowed Urami Bushi (the theme song sung by Kaji) for the soundtrack to Kill Bill. Kojima noted that the Female Prisoner Scorpion series’ use of inventive cinematography and camera angles, plus the young crew’s commitment to creating something unique on a very limited budget, inspired him as a game creator.
paragraphs.cn: 小岛这次是在Piccolo America基金会举办的第12届罗马户外电影节Il Cinema in Piazza上说出这句话。据Game Surf报道，他参加了座谈并介绍多部电影。7月4日，他推介了伊藤俊也1972年的《女囚701号：蝎子之第41杂居房》，这是日本东映剥削电影系列的第二部。该片及主演梶芽衣子深深影响了昆汀·塔伦蒂诺，后者甚至在《杀死比尔》配乐中采用梶芽衣子演唱的主题曲《怨歌》。小岛说，《女囚蝎子》系列富有创意的摄影和机位，以及年轻团队用极有限预算创造独特作品的坚持，都启发了他的游戏创作。

paragraphs.en: He also introduced Dario Argentino’s Profondo Rosso (1975) on June 5, praising the moment in the movie when both the protagonist and viewer realize the truth at the same moment. “It is something I try to put in my own games as well," Kojima said.
paragraphs.cn: 他还在6月5日介绍了达里奥·阿基多1975年的《深红的迷宫》，并称赞片中主角与观众同时意识到真相的瞬间。小岛说：「这也是我尝试放进自己游戏里的东西。」

paragraphs.en: "He also explained that he referenced the gorier moments in Argentino’s films in Policenauts and Snatcher by including decapitation, but that this became a no-go when he moved on to making PlayStation console exclusives.
paragraphs.cn: 他还解释，自己曾在《宇宙骑警》和《掠夺者》中加入斩首场面，借鉴阿基多电影中更血腥的时刻；但后来转而制作PlayStation主机独占游戏时，这类内容便不再获准。

paragraphs.en: The final film Kojima presented at the festival alongside Death Stranding 2 actor Luca Marinelli was Sergio Leone’s The Good, the Bad and the Ugly (1966). Kojima said that growing up, his movie-watching family took him to see both American and Italian Westerns, and that he was struck by the sharp difference in their worldview, noting that while the sheriff always wins in American Westerns, Italian Westerns have characters that are much more human and less clear cut. Kojima said that the moral ambiguity of Leone’s Westerns won him over as it reminded him of Akira Kurosawa’s classic films.
paragraphs.cn: 小岛在电影节上与《死亡搁浅2》演员Luca Marinelli共同介绍的最后一部影片，是赛尔乔·莱昂内1966年的《黄金三镖客》。小岛说，成长过程中，爱看电影的家人带他看过美国和意大利西部片，两者世界观的鲜明差异令他震撼：美国西部片中警长总会获胜，意大利西部片的角色却更有人性，也更难简单划分善恶。莱昂内西部片的道德模糊性让他着迷，因为这令他想起黑泽明的经典电影。

paragraphs.en: Kojima’s movie influences show clearly in his games, stretching back to 1987’s Metal Gear and 1988’s Snatcher. But it was the groundbreaking Metal Gear Solid, which brought cinematic lighting, fully-voiced dialogue, and the series’ famously long movie-like cutscenes to PlayStation gamers all over the world back in 1998. Kojima has previously namechecked war movies like The Great Escape and The Guns of Navarrone as among the influences on MGS, with Snake’s character design riffing off Kurt Russel’s Snake Plisskin in Escape from New York.
paragraphs.cn: 电影对小岛游戏的影响清晰可见，最早可追溯至1987年的《潜龙谍影》和1988年的《掠夺者》。真正具有突破性的是《潜龙谍影：固蛇》，它在1998年把电影化灯光、全程语音对话和系列著名的超长电影式过场带给全球PlayStation玩家。小岛此前曾点名《大逃亡》《纳瓦隆大炮》等战争片是MGS的灵感来源，Snake的角色设计也借鉴了库尔特·拉塞尔在《纽约大逃亡》中饰演的Snake Plissken。

paragraphs.en: With Death Stranding 1 and 2, Kojima managed to bridge the gap between game and movie even more by featuring the fully captured performances of well-known actors like Norman Reedus and Lea Seydoux.
paragraphs.cn: 在《死亡搁浅》和《死亡搁浅2》中，小岛通过完整捕捉Norman Reedus、Léa Seydoux等知名演员的表演，进一步弥合了游戏与电影之间的鸿沟。

paragraphs.en: Over on X, Kojima often shares his thoughts on recent movies he’s seen in theaters, as well as Blu-ray releases he has picked up. He seems to watch a broad range of films from various genres, countries and decades. He also popped up on an episode of the Criterion’s closet picks , where he appeared overjoyed to be surrounded by so many movies and enthusiastically introduced his picks.
paragraphs.cn: 小岛经常在X分享近期于影院观看的电影感想，以及自己购买的蓝光影碟。他观看的影片横跨多种类型、国家和年代。他还登上Criterion的「壁橱选片」节目，被大量电影包围时显得欣喜若狂，并热情介绍自己的选择。

paragraphs.en: Kojima is also an avid collector of physical media including vinyl records, CDs, DVDs, and Blu-rays. In the wake of Sony’s recent announcement to stop releasing games on disc, Kojima retweeted a comment on the importance of physical media, warning of the dangers of a digital-only future.
paragraphs.cn: 小岛也是实体媒体的狂热收藏者，收藏黑胶唱片、CD、DVD和蓝光影碟。索尼最近宣布停止发行游戏光盘后，他转发了一则强调实体媒体重要性的评论，并警告全数字化未来的风险。

paragraphs.en: He went further with this train of thought at Il Cinema, specifically calling out Sony : "Since production is ending in 2028, this is about video games, but I grew up with physical media, so I find it really sad," Kojima said. "Currently, I’ve been buying up a lot of Blu-rays, such as various movies, and CDs too."
paragraphs.cn: 他在Il Cinema电影节进一步谈到这一观点，并特别点名索尼。小岛说：「因为2028年就要停产了；这虽然说的是电子游戏，但我是伴随实体媒体长大的，所以真的感到很难过。我最近一直在大量购买各种电影的蓝光影碟，也买了不少CD。」

paragraphs.en: Hideo Kojima is currently working on experimental horror game OD, which is slated to be published by Xbox Game Studios in collaboration with Get Out director Jordan Peele. At the time of writing, the game doesn’t have a release window yet.
paragraphs.cn: 小岛秀夫目前正开发实验性恐怖游戏《OD》，该作将由XBOX Game Studios发行，并与《逃出绝命镇》导演Jordan Peele合作。截至发稿，游戏尚无发售窗口。

paragraphs.en: Verity Townsend is a Japan-based freelance writer who previously served as editor, contributor and translator for the game news site Automaton West. She has also written about Japanese culture and movies for various publications.
paragraphs.cn: Verity Townsend是常驻日本的自由撰稿人，曾担任游戏新闻网站Automaton West的编辑、撰稿人与译者，也为多家出版物撰写日本文化和电影相关内容。

opus_summary: 小岛秀夫表示，希望在电影院正片开始前离世。他回顾疫情后对死亡与创作期限的思考，并在罗马电影节详谈多部经典电影如何影响《潜龙谍影》《死亡搁浅》等作品。
